choose.when:
<set-variable name="originalBody" value="@(context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true))" />
      
      
      
      
        
          
          
            @($"{{{{astrocyte-gateway-url}}}}/v1/recall")
            POST
            
              application/json
            
            
              {{astrocyte-api-key}}
            
            @{
              return new JObject(
                new JProperty("query", (string)context.Variables["requestJson"]),
                new JProperty("bank_id", (string)context.Variables["bankId"]),
                new JProperty("max_results", 5)
              ).ToString();
            }
          
          
          
            
              <set-variable name="recallBody" value="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["recallResponse"]).Body.As())" />
              @{
                var recall = JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["recallBody"]);
                var hits = recall["hits"] as JArray;
                if (hits == null || hits.Count == 0) {
                  return (string)context.Variables["originalBody"];
                }
                // Format memory hits
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                sb.AppendLine("The following memories are relevant to this conversation:");
                for (int i = 0; i < hits.Count; i++) {
                  sb.AppendLine($"[Memory {i + 1}] {hits[i]["text"]?.ToString()}");
                }
                var memoryBlock = sb.ToString();
                // Inject into request body
                var body = JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["originalBody"]);
                var messages = body["messages"] as JArray;
                bool hasSystem = false;
                foreach (var msg in messages) {
                  if (msg["role"]?.ToString() == "system") {
                    msg["content"] = msg["content"]?.ToString() + "\n\n" + memoryBlock;
                    hasSystem = true;
                    break;
                  }
                }
                if (!hasSystem) {
                  var systemMsg = new JObject(
                    new JProperty("role", "system"),
                    new JProperty("content", memoryBlock)
                  );
                  messages.Insert(0, systemMsg);
                }
                return body.ToString();
              }
